$comment: Routing hints (spec §4) — and the delegation allow-list (spec §7): a repo absent from this file is not delegable even if registered in Orca. Adding a delegable repo = one commit here. `name` must match the Orca registry displayName; `defaultAgent` (claude|codex) is optional — omitted means the global default `claude` (issue #10: all-claude at the start).

repos.name: forwardly
repos.description: The product web app — email campaigns and send metrics; real features wired to real data.

repos.name: orca
repos.description: The Orca runtime and CLI — the worktree/agent manager that runs the delegated workers on this VPS.

repos.name: scratch
repos.description: Sandbox for one-shot scripts, experiments and benchmarks — nothing here ships to users.

repos.name: orchestrator
repos.description: This Slack-driven orchestrator-dispatcher daemon (the bot itself) — routing, sessions, delegation, supervision.
